propositions: The old 'two green votes means it will land' model is broken because a conflict blocks landing while votes stay green.
Rewrite the landing section in CLAUDE.md and CONTRIBUTING.md to instruct agents to set Autosubmit / run land and act on the single typed outcome instead of watching votes.
Grep the whole repo for the deprecated 'two green votes' / 'watch votes' pattern and update all occurrences, not just CLAUDE.md and CONTRIBUTING.md.

Author ADR-0042 recording the auto-lander, the agent contract and outcome enum, the staged serial-to-batch plan, and the separation-of-concerns boundary, anchored to idea id 1701-8bc1-e3b7-4984 after confirming it resolves.
Docs must cross-reference ADR-0040 (FFO) and ADR-0041 (LLM-Review TRIVIAL_REBASE carry) as the gate substrate the lander sits on.
Docs must not merge to main until the Autosubmit label (S1) and land command (S4) are live.
